title: West Asia war poses no recession risk for India, but economic slowdown is on the cards: Madan Sabnavis
summary: Bank of Baroda chief economist Madan Sabnavis states a recession (negative GDP growth for two quarters) is unlikely. Even in a worst-case scenario, GDP growth may slow to around 7% from 7.2-7.25% currently projected.
